testcase.name: shouldReturn422WhenChannelIsNotMobile
testcase.system-out:

Only MOBILE transactions are accepted.

testcase.name: shouldReturn401WhenTokenIsExpired
testcase.system-out: 2026-04-24 18:43:25.253 [main] WARN c.t.i.security.JwtTokenProvider - Invalid JWT token: JWT expired 3600237 milliseconds ago at 2026-04-24T17:43:25.000Z. Current time: 2026-04-24T18:43:25.237Z. Allowed clock skew: 0 milliseconds.

testcase.name: shouldReturn202ForValidTransaction
testcase.system-out: 2026-04-24 18:43:25.305 [main] INFO c.t.controller.TransactionController - Received POST /transactions request: type='PIX', amount='500.00' 2026-04-24 18:43:25.305 [main] INFO c.t.service.TransactionService - Processing transaction: customerId='customer-123', type='PIX', amount='500.00', channel='MOBILE' 2026-04-24 18:43:25.305 [main] INFO c.t.service.TransactionService - Fetching session from LoginService for customerId='customer-123' 2026-04-24 18:43:25.317 [main] INFO c.t.i.client.LoginClient - Calling LoginService /me endpoint 2026-04-24 18:43:25.752 [main] INFO c.t.i.client.LoginClient - LoginService response received for user: customer-123 2026-04-24 18:43:25.754 [main] INFO c.t.service.TransactionService - Session validated: username='customer-123', contractService='true' 2026-04-24 18:43:25.758 [main] INFO c.t.service.TransactionService - Transaction processed successfully: customerId='customer-123', type='PIX' 2026-04-24 18:43:25.758 [main] INFO c.t.controller.TransactionController - Transaction accepted: transactionId='4e364c32-1fd4-4c88-9f2d-dcb0971f049a'

testcase.name: shouldReturn422WhenNoContractedService
testcase.system-out: 2026-04-24 18:43:25.799 [main] INFO c.t.controller.TransactionController - Received POST /transactions request: type='PIX', amount='100.00' 2026-04-24 18:43:25.799 [main] INFO c.t.service.TransactionService - Processing transaction: customerId='customer-456', type='PIX', amount='100.00', channel='MOBILE' 2026-04-24 18:43:25.799 [main] INFO c.t.service.TransactionService - Fetching session from LoginService for customerId='customer-456' 2026-04-24 18:43:25.799 [main] INFO c.t.i.client.LoginClient - Calling LoginService /me endpoint 2026-04-24 18:43:25.810 [main] INFO c.t.i.client.LoginClient - LoginService response received for user: customer-456 2026-04-24 18:43:25.811 [main] INFO c.t.service.TransactionService - Session validated: username='customer-456', contractService='false' 2026-04-24 18:43:25.811 [main] WARN c.t.service.TransactionService - Transaction rejected: customerId='customer-456', reason='Cliente não possui serviço contratado' 2026-04-24 18:43:25.812 [main] WARN c.t.c.GlobalExceptionHandler - Business rule violation: Cliente não possui serviço contratado

testcase.name: shouldReturn503WhenLoginServiceIsUnavailable
testcase.system-out: 2026-04-24 18:43:25.835 [main] INFO c.t.controller.TransactionController - Received POST /transactions request: type='PIX', amount='100.00' 2026-04-24 18:43:25.835 [main] INFO c.t.service.TransactionService - Processing transaction: customerId='customer-333', type='PIX', amount='100.00', channel='MOBILE' 2026-04-24 18:43:25.835 [main] INFO c.t.service.TransactionService - Fetching session from LoginService for customerId='customer-333' 2026-04-24 18:43:25.836 [main] INFO c.t.i.client.LoginClient - Calling LoginService /me endpoint 2026-04-24 18:43:30.841 [main] ERROR c.t.i.client.LoginClient - LoginService fallback triggered. Cause: java.util.concurrent.TimeoutException: Did not observe any item or terminal signal within 5000ms in 'flatMap' (and no fallback has been configured) 2026-04-24 18:43:30.841 [main] WARN c.t.i.client.LoginClient - Fail-fast mode: blocking transaction due to LoginService unavailability 2026-04-24 18:43:30.842 [main] ERROR c.t.service.TransactionService - Unexpected error processing transaction for customerId='customer-333': LoginService is currently unavailable. Transaction blocked for safety. com.transactionservice.exception.LoginServiceUnavailableException: LoginService is currently unavailable. Transaction blocked for safety. at com.transactionservice.infrastructure.client.LoginClient.getSessionFallback(LoginClient.java:62) at testcase.name: shouldReturn400WhenRequestIsInvalid
testcase.system-out: 2026-04-24 18:43:30.870 [main] WARN c.t.c.GlobalExceptionHandler - Validation failed: [Amount must be greater than zero]
